data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. Two concrete gaps: (1) it says to reuse install.sh target detection, but the actual release matrix only publishes x86_64-unknown-linux-musl, aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, and aarch64-apple-darwin, so the plan must explicitly define supported targets and not assume x86_64-apple-darwin exists; (2) this is a new user-facing CLI command and release/install-related behavior, but the plan omits the required doc updates called out in CONTRIBUTING.md (README/docs/getting-started as appropriate, plus docs/releasing.md if release/install behavior is part of the story). Tighten the test plan to cover --force/--check behavior and unsupported-target handling as part of the revision.
